case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. SASTINI, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

CIVIL COVER SHEET (JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM) FILED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN

DEPT 1/JUDGE DESMOND/CLERK:G.SHULL. NOT ON RECORD. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ATNY SIDNEY BERENSTEIN PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT BRIAN BURRIS PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFT BURRIS PURSUANT TO STIP & JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP; TERMS NOT RECITED. ALL PARTIES PRESENT REPRESENT THAT THEY HAVE READ THE STIPULATION, UNDERSTAND ITS CONTENTS, AND AGREE TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT. DEFT ROBERT SASTINI IS NOT PRESENT; HIS NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE HAVING BEEN RETURNED UNDELIVERED. PLTF TO FILE DISMISSAL AS TO DEFT SASTINI ONLY. DEFT BURRIS REPRESENTS THAT SASTINI HAS VACATED PREMISES.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BURRIS, BRIAN
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-18-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-25-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT JURY TRIAL OF MAR-25-1997 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $20.71 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SASTINI, ROBERT BURRIS, BRIAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURRIS, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O'FARRELL STREET #315, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-02-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL SIGN STIP TO VACATE JUDGMNT & DISM W/PREJ IF PREPARED BY DEFT. GENERAL RELEASE & WAIVER. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED & MAY BE DISPOSED OF BY PLTF.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
